<!-- Describe the code as it is today. Cite files and line ranges. What smells, duplication, or coupling does it have? -->

<!-- Describe the target structure. What will the code look like after? Why is it better? -->

## Risk

<!-- What could break? How will you detect regressions? List blast radius (files / modules affected). -->

<!-- How will you prove the refactor preserves behavior? Which existing tests cover this area? Will you add characterization tests first? -->
